title: [Bug]: JSON_EXTRACT not work with number
description:
<!-- A clear and concise description of bug. -->
if json value is number，and there are double quotation marks on both sides，JSON_EXTRACT not work
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testjson (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, json JSON NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM testjson WHERE json->>'num' IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: JSON_EXTRACT fails with quoted numeric values
